moves.answer: Key cohort separations are tested across multiple defensible weight profiles.
moves.title: Sensitivity

moves.answer: Median cohort scores are resampled with uncertainty intervals.
moves.skeptic_question: Do small samples break the conclusion?
moves.title: Bootstrap

moves.answer: Each session is removed one at a time and cohort medians are recomputed.
moves.skeptic_question: Is one unusual session driving the result?
moves.title: Leave-one-out

moves.answer: Burden and functional output are separated.
moves.skeptic_question: Are useful modalities being forced to look low burden?
moves.title: Functional efficiency

moves.answer: Nonparametric tests and effect sizes compare key cohorts.
moves.title: Cohort separation

moves.answer: Outputs link to reviewer questions without making legal conclusions.
moves.skeptic_question: How does this connect to risk review?
moves.title: Evidence linkage

moves.answer: Cohort findings link to chronology and source attachment review.
moves.title: Chronology/source linkage

moves.answer: Structured protocol fields connect evidence to actual-risk review.
moves.skeptic_question: Can risk be handled without categorical exclusion?
moves.title: Protocol/source linkage

moves.answer: Formula, outputs, validation files, and hashes are version locked.
moves.skeptic_question: Is the model a moving target?
moves.title: Model/version/artifact lock
